persona_prompt:
You are filtering Boston events for someone who wants high-status, interesting things to attend:
- Oyster happy hours or upscale food/drink (wine dinners, tastings, chef's tables)
- Galas, fundraisers, charity benefits, receptions, award ceremonies
- Events where they can attend as a subject matter expert: public records law, open meeting law, FOIA, government transparency, civic accountability, journalism
- High-status professional networking, panels, policy forums
- Fashion/model events, press events, media events, bikini/swimwear shows, fitness model showcases, promotional model events
- Recurring upscale nightlife events, scene-y bar/club nights, influencer events
- Anything exclusive, influential, or scene-y

NOT wanted: pure sports games, road races, youth sports, basic trivia nights at chains.

events.name: Biotech Networking at Naco Taco in Cambridge
events.description:
We are excited to have our next networking event at Naco Taco in Cambridge! 🌮🍹

This evening is all about bringing together biotech innovators in a fun and relaxed setting. Expect engaging conversations that spark new ideas, opportunities to build lasting connections, and plenty of chances to share insights on the latest biotech trends. It is also a great space to brainstorm collaborations and explore opportunities that can help take your career to the next level.

Whether you are hoping to meet
events.reason: Biotech Networking at Naco Taco — professional networking in biotech/life sciences with casual venue, good for Brian's circles

events.name: Boston AI Agents Night 2 — Agents That Actually Do Stuff 🦞
events.description:
Night 1 we built them. Night 2 we put them to work.

We're at the Nerd Center for a deeper dive — real agents running real tasks, live demos and the stuff nobody posts on LinkedIn.

🔥 WHAT'S HAPPENING:

6:30 PM — Doors open, food & drinks, networking
7:00 PM — "What We've Learned Since Night 1" — what worked, what broke, what surprised us
7:15 PM — LIVE DEMO: An agent that manages email, schedules meetings, and takes action autonomously
7:45 PM — "Agents in the Wild" — real professionals share h
events.reason: AI startup/tech networking with food, drinks, live demos, and real professional speakers; strong venue and innovative focus

events.name: In-Person Weekly Hack Night - Third Tuesday
events.description:
Code for Boston is now running In-Person meetups every first and third Tuesday, with Zoom option. Other Tuesdays, we convene in Zoom. We also offer new member orientation both in-person and on Zoom.
Join us for civic volunteering with project champions from local government, non-profits, and the like!
If you are going to attend the virtual event, please make sure to do the following, and then join us on Zoom at 7pm EST:

* Join our Slack: [http://slack.codeforboston.org](http://slack.codeforbost
events.reason: Civic volunteering with government and nonprofit leaders aligns with Brian's expertise in public records/government transparency. Good networking with people in civic sector.

events.name: Aristotles Politics, Books 1 & 2
events.description:
Platos’ student Aristotle lays out his classification of political regimes and what the aims of any regime should be. It is in this philosophical work that Aristotle comes up with the term “mixed regime”, which has caused so much debate among philosophers of justice and political theorists down the centuries. Is only a mixed regime just because raw Oligarchy, Democracy, or Tyranny each neglect justice in some fundamental form?

We will read the first two books- a short and sweet 50 pages. Here i
events.reason: Aristotle's Politics discussion—intellectual forum on government and justice aligned with civic/governance interests

events.name: Berklee Popular Music Institute Showcase (18+)
events.description: THIS EVENT IS 18+ WITH A VALID I.D. DOORS: 6:00 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Will you go to prom with us? Experience a night of nostalgia, ?80s glamour, and unforgettable live performances at the Berklee Popular Music Institute?s (BPMI) 24th annual showcase, featuring eight artists handpicked by its 2026 student cohort. Soundtracking this year?s dance floor will be Beno, Good Sleepy, Jazz Cuti, JimmyBoy, Leila Lamb, Nico Welsh, Pat Kennedy, and Sophie?s Body. Representing genres ranging from reggaeton to pop-punk and indie to country, these artists have displayed extraordinary talent, securing spots at Governors Ball, Lollapalooza, Southside, and other major festivals to be announced soon. It?s going to be a night to remember! Brighton Music Hall is a GA, standing room only venue. There is a seating area available for those with mobility limitations. If you require accommodation, we encourage you to reach out to information@crossroadspresents.com as soon as you have purchased your GA tickets.
events.venue: Brighton Music Hall presented by Citizens
events.reason: Berklee showcase with emerging artists heading to major festivals (Governors Ball, Lollapalooza); 18+ at Brighton Music Hall; great emerging talent scene
